title: US president Donald Trump arrives in Scotland for four-day visit

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: The US president will be playing golf as well as meeting the prime minister and first minister for talks.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Trump says 'great to be in Scotland', as he lands for four-day trip US president Donald Trump said "it's great to be in Scotland" as he landed for a four-day private visit.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: After Air Force One touched down at Prestwick Airport, just before 20:30, the US president was met by Scottish Secretary Ian Murray and Warren Stephens, US Ambassador to the UK. Trump spoke to journalists before the presidential motorcade left for his Turnberry resort, in South Ayrshire, where he is expected to play golf on Saturday.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Planespotters gather to catch glimpse of Air Force One
